use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with satisfying ripple feedback
Interactive form submission with animated click effects
Ghost buttons for secondary actions with hover borders
Hover-animated buttons for visual emphasis and micro-interactions
Customizable disabled button states with consistent styling
ai_summary: A multi-variant React button component featuring JavaScript-driven ripple effects on click and multiple animation modes including hover reveals, ghost states, and gradient borders. Designed for modern UI systems with customizable colors, durations, and effects through TypeScript props. Suitable for creating interactive, polished button experiences across SaaS, e-commerce, and developer tools applications.
